title: astragalus piscator
intro: Astragalus piscator, also known as Huang qi, is a type of perennial legume plant native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the Astragalus genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant's health benefits include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions such as common colds, chronic fatigue syndrome, and anemia. Astragalus piscator can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
